subcodes.first_line: The people of the Bayán, in their own estimation, did shatter the chains of blind imitation and, with utmost freedom, turned their faces toward the horizon of divine unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهل بیان بگمان خود سلاسل تقلید را شکستند و بکمال آزادی بافق توحید توجه نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
